requirement_topic.en: EMC, Low-Voltage Safety, and Residual-Current Protection
requirement_topic.zh: EMC、低电压安全与剩余电流保护
requirement_topic.zht: EMC、低電壓安全與剩餘電流保護

summary.en: EV chargers placed on North Macedonia CE-aligned market normally need conformity evidence for applicable electrical safety and EMC legislation. For EVSE, IEC 61851-1 includes EVSE electrical-safety requirements; EMC evidence is mapped separately to the applicable EMC route and charger-specific EMC test standard. Residual-current protection, DC residual-current detection, protective earthing, overcurrent protection, surge protection, and installation coordination should be documented for final site design.
summary.zh: 投放北马其顿 CE 对齐市场的电动汽车充电桩通常需要提供适用电气安全和EMC法规的符合性证据。对 EVSE 来说，IEC 61851-1 包含EVSE电气安全要求；EMC证据通常需另行映射至适用 EMC 路径和充电桩专用 EMC 测试标准。剩余电流保护、DC残余电流检测、保护接地、过流保护、浪涌保护及安装协调应在最终站点设计中形成文件。
summary.zht: 投放北馬其頓 CE 對齊市場的電動車充電樁通常需要提供適用電氣安全與 EMC 法規的符合性證據。對 EVSE 而言，IEC 61851-1 包含 EVSE 電氣安全要求；EMC 證據通常需另行映射至適用 EMC 路徑和充電樁專用 EMC 測試標準。剩餘電流保護、DC 殘餘電流偵測、保護接地、過電流保護、浪湧保護及安裝協調應在最終站點設計中文件化。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/35/EU Low Voltage Directive, North Macedonia implementation to be verified
Directive 2014/30/EU EMC Directive, North Macedonia implementation to be verified
IEC 61851-21-2 EMC route for off-board EV charging systems, current edition to be verified

summary.en: Chinese files may include GB/T 18487.1 safety evidence, GB/T 18487.2 EMC evidence for off-board conductive supply equipment, component certificates, and site electrical drawings. These should be clause-mapped and retested where needed for North Macedonia CE, IEC / EN, site-earthing, RCD, and installation assumptions.
summary.zh: 中国资料可能包括GB/T 18487.1安全证据、GB/T 18487.2非车载传导供电设备EMC证据、部件证书和现场电气图纸。应进行条款映射，并在需要时按北马其顿CE、IEC/EN、现场接地、RCD和安装假设进行复测。
summary.zht: 中國資料可能包括 GB/T 18487.1 安全證據、GB/T 18487.2 非車載傳導供電設備 EMC 證據、部件證書與現場電氣圖紙。應進行條款映射，並在必要時按北馬其頓 CE、IEC/EN、現場接地、RCD 與安裝假設進行複測。

gap.en: The gap is often in installation assumptions rather than lab reports: earthing system, upstream breaker, RCD type or RDC-DD arrangement, DC leakage handling, EMC cable routing, surge protection, short-circuit rating, enclosure IP/IK, ambient rating, and North Macedonia-language warnings should match the actual deployment.
gap.zh: 差距往往不只在实验室报告，而在于安装假设：接地系统、上级断路器、RCD类型或RDC-DD配置、直流漏电处理、EMC布线、浪涌保护、短路额定、外壳IP/IK、环境额定以及北马其顿语警示应与实际部署一致。
gap.zht: 差距通常不只在實驗室報告，而在安裝假設：接地系統、上級斷路器、RCD 類型或 RDC-DD 配置、直流漏電處理、EMC 佈線、浪湧保護、短路額定、外殼 IP/IK、環境額定及北馬其頓語警示必須與實際部署一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable CE-aligned low-voltage and EMC legislation applies; RCD and installation protection are mandatory where required by the applicable installation design, grid connection, or electrical code route
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T safety and EMC evidence supports comparison but does not replace North Macedonia CE and site-installation verification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on a China EMC or safety report without checking North Macedonia CE scope, IEC / EN test coverage, and the real site protection design. RCD, earthing, leakage detection, and EMC installation assumptions should be documented before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应在未核实北马其顿CE范围、IEC/EN测试覆盖和真实现场保护设计的情况下依赖中国EMC或安全报告。调试前应形成RCD、接地、漏电检测和EMC安装假设文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 未核實北馬其頓 CE 範圍、IEC / EN 測試覆蓋及實際現場保護設計前，不應僅依賴中國 EMC 或安全報告。調試前應完成 RCD、接地、漏電偵測及 EMC 安裝假設文件。
